query: Microsoft Copilot Apple CarPlay availability announcement Microsoft 365 Copilot app CarPlay official blog 2025

{"query":"Microsoft Copilot Apple CarPlay availability announcement Microsoft 365 Copilot app CarPlay official blog 2025","model":"mako","response_time_ms":2619,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/blog/microsoft365copilotblog/what%E2%80%99s-new-in-microsoft-365-copilot--may-2026/4522010","title":"What’s New in Microsoft 365 Copilot | May 2026 | Microsoft Community Hub","content":"- Refreshed design, Notebooks enhancements, and Apple CarPlay for the Microsoft 365 Copilot app
Users can use voice to start a new conversation or continue an existing chat through their car’s built-in display and audio system.
OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Instant is now available in Microsoft 365 Copilot and Microsoft Copilot Studio, bringing higher-quality responses for everyday work tasks, image analysis, and STEM-related questions.
We are maintaining our existing certification for Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat, Microsoft Security Copilot, and Microsoft Foundry (first certified in 2025 by Mastermind Assurance, an IAS-accredited certification body).
The first wave includes connectors for partners such as LSEG, Moody’s, HubSpot, and Notion, with availability today in Copilot Chat and Researcher.
This feature rolled out to GA in March, GCC-High in May, and is rolling out to DoD in June."},{"url":"https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365-copilot/voice-apple-carplay","title":"Use Microsoft 365 Copilot in Apple CarPlay | Microsoft Support","content":"With Apple CarPlay support for Copilot, you can start and continue voice conversations safely while you drive.
Use hands-free, voice interactions whenever possible."},{"url":"https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/roadmap","title":"Microsoft 365 Roadmap | Microsoft 365","content":"Microsoft 365 Copilot Roadmap Webinar-your monthly front-row seat to what's new, live demos, and what’s next-
Copilot in Outlook introduces new agentic experiences for email and calendar, enabling AI to take action across scheduling, follow‑ups, and inbox management.
Try new features early, give real-time feedback, and influence what ships to all users.

I searched on the web and all I could figure out was that there was an update error in August of 2025 that caused it and that it has been fixed."},{"url":"https://blog.cloudcapsule.io/blog/whats-new-in-microsoft-365-july-updates","title":"What’s New in Microsoft 365 | July Updates","content":"Microsoft released a number of updates during July, including Teams, Outlook, Entra, Intune, Copilot, and more!
Coming August 18, 2025 (previously July 16) and completes by September 1, 2025 (previously July 28)."}]}

Previously, the Copilot for iOS app only supported sign-in with a Microsoft account.","score":0.70483154,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/blog/microsoft365insiderblog/whats-new-in-the-microsoft-365-copilot-app---april-2025/4406283","title":"What’s New in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app – April 2025","content":"# What's new in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app - April 2025. My name is Lisa Svensson, and I’m a Senior Product Marketing Manager for the Microsoft 365 Copilot app *(formerly the Microsoft 365 (Office) app)* available on the web, desktop, iOS and Android devices. ### What’s New in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app – April 2025. This round-up covers new enhancements to the Microsoft 365 Copilot app on the web, on desktop (Windows and Mac), and on mobile (Android and iOS) for consumers with a Microsoft 365 subscription. The Microsoft 365 Copilot app is your everyday productivity app for work and life that helps you find and edit files, scan documents, and create content on the go with access to Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat\\*, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, PDFs, and more all in one app. \\*Copilot Chat in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app is available for Microsoft 365 Enterprise, Academic, SMB, Personal and Family subscribers with a work, education, or personal account.","score":0.6952351,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365-copilot/voice-apple-carplay","title":"Use Microsoft 365 Copilot in Apple CarPlay","content":"Microsoft 365 Copilot is available on Apple CarPlay.
